title: drosanthemum breve
intro: Drosanthemum breve, also known as the short daisy or short drosanthemum, is a flowering plant species in the family Aizoaceae, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Traditionally, Drosanthemum breve has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Drosanthemum breve is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or topical cream.
